title: Measure Governance Cycle Time
description: Calculate elapsed time from architecture proposal to approved decision. Compare against AI deployment cadence. This single metric quantifies the urgency of governance reform.

title: Create AI Agent Registry
description: Document every deployed agent: role, capabilities, access permissions, data inputs, decision authority, performance metrics, and accountable human owner.

title: Audit AI Use Cases for Model Right-Sizing
description: Catalogue current AI use cases by task complexity. Run head-to-head evaluations of fine-tuned smaller models versus frontier models on top production use cases.

title: Infrastructure Readiness Assessment
description: Map each planned AI workload to compute, network, storage, and integration requirements. Compare against current capacity to identify the investment gap.

title: Classify AI Investments by Value Type
description: Survey C-suite expectations. Classify current AI portfolio by value type (productivity vs revenue). Surface and resolve the expectation gap.

title: Assess Process Readiness Before Agent Deployment
description: For every proposed agent deployment: is the process documented with quantitative data? Has the workflow been redesigned for agent strengths?

title: Design Model Abstraction Layer
description: Implement standardised interfaces and vendor-neutral APIs. The litmus test: can you swap your primary LLM provider within eight hours?

title: Protocol Abstraction for Agent Communication
description: Design a communication abstraction layer decoupling agent implementations from protocol specifics (MCP, A2A, or proprietary).

title: Establish AI FinOps Discipline
description: Define standard cost categories for AI operations. Implement cost tracking per use case. Set budget thresholds and escalation triggers.

title: Pilot Operating Model Codification
description: Make one high-volume process's operating logic explicit and machine-readable — decision rules, exception paths, governance controls in a format an AI agent could interpret.

title: Map Sovereignty Requirements
description: Audit current and planned AI workloads for data residency, model provenance, and jurisdictional constraints. Assess whether infrastructure can satisfy them.

title: Distributed Tracing and Blast-Radius Controls
description: Before deploying your second agent, implement distributed tracing across agent interactions and define blast-radius controls for cascade failure prevention.
